programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura Ingalls is stunned to learn that her fishing friend is Walnut Grove's new banker; she gets upset when he accuses her of befriending him to secure a loan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: At the End of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Laura thinks she has found gold and imagines the glamorous life it can buy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: One Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: With help from their best friends, a happy couple plan the perfect wedding at the same place where their romance began.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape for the big day. Things get complicated when sparks start to fly between herself and Nick, the fiancé of one of her new clients.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: After their wedding venue reserves the wrong date, Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: Hello, It's Me
programme.desc: A widow receives messages from her late husband, urging her to move on and heal with a new man in her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: With Elizabeth at his side, Election Day has the entire town supporting Lucas, hoping he will save Hope Valley; Rosemary and Lee discuss who should be their baby's godfather.

programme.desc: Elizabeth turns over a new leaf; Nathan returns home from an investigation, while Bill questions its outcome; Rosemary chases a scoop; Lucas makes a surprise announcement.

programme.desc: Elizabeth and Allie plan a birthday party for Nathan; Lee and Rosemary weigh business responsibilities against family time; Lucas settles into his role as governor.
